full_text:
Wu Can (Kongxiu) 吾粲 (孔休)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Can (吾粲), styledKongxiu (孔休), was born in Wucheng in Wu commandery. Was promoted into office by Sun He. Helped to pacify the Shanyue. Wu Can was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Wu Can lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
